metadata.description: Claude plugins from Labyrinth Analytics Consulting. Persistent memory and knowledge management for Claude sessions.

plugins.name: loreconvo
plugins.description: Cross-surface persistent memory for Claude sessions. Vault conversations from Code, Cowork, and Chat -- recall decisions, artifacts, and context in any future session.

plugins.name: loredocs
plugins.description: Searchable, organized knowledge base for your AI projects. Store documents, tag them, search across them, and inject context into any Claude conversation.
